user.title: Add Hai shower
user.description: Set up a Hai Smart Shower using nearby Bluetooth discovery. If your shower is not listed, enter its Bluetooth address manually. To confirm the correct shower in the Hai app, open My Hai > Product Info and compare the Product ID.

confirm_discovery.title: Confirm discovered shower
confirm_discovery.description: Home Assistant discovered a nearby Hai shower: {name} at {address}. Confirm the device name, then continue to Hai cloud login so the integration can match the shower's Product ID to the cloud serial.

cloud_login.title: Hai cloud login
cloud_login.description: Sign in with your Hai account to fetch the device encryption key. This is a one-time step; your credentials are not stored. BLE address: {address}

reauth_confirm.title: Refresh Hai cloud bootstrap
reauth_confirm.description: Sign in with your Hai account again to refresh the stored device encryption key for {name}. BLE address: {address}

reconfigure_confirm.title: Correct Bluetooth address
reconfigure_confirm.description: Update the Bluetooth address Home Assistant should use for {name}. If the shower is nearby, you can select it from discovery instead of typing the address manually.

select_device.title: Select device
select_device.description: Choose which Hai device corresponds to this showerhead.

error.no_address: Select a discovered shower or enter a Bluetooth address.
error.choose_one_address: Choose a discovered shower or enter a Bluetooth address, not both.
error.address_in_use: Another Hai shower entry already uses that Bluetooth address.
error.auth_failed: Hai cloud authentication failed. Check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Hai cloud service right now.
error.invalid_api_response: Hai returned data in an unexpected format.
error.no_devices: No devices found on this Hai account.

abort.already_configured: This Hai shower is already configured.
abort.auth_failed: Hai cloud authentication expired during setup. Start setup again.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Hai cloud service right now. Try again later.
abort.device_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch the selected Hai device details.
abort.invalid_api_response: Hai returned device data in an unexpected format.
abort.invalid_device_key: Hai returned device key data that this integration cannot use yet.
abort.no_selectable_devices: No selectable Hai devices were returned for this account.
abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth discovery is not a supported Hai shower.
abort.unknown_error: An unexpected error occurred during setup.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: This shower is already configured with a different entry.
abort.wrong_device: The selected Hai account does not contain the configured shower.
abort.reauth_successful: The device encryption key was refreshed successfully.
